experience_focus: Prepared and validated large healthcare datasets used by reporting and analytics teams.
Used advanced SQL to reconcile source and target data across high-volume claims and member records.
Collaborated with stakeholders across QA, engineering, and business teams to support reporting quality and releases.
Improved downstream KPI trust through disciplined validation and defect reduction.
Brought prior banking, retail, and e-commerce ETL experience that supports work across varied enterprise datasets.
gaps: Posting looks more customer-facing BI and dashboard creation than ETL-heavy validation
Requests QuickSight/AWS familiarity rather than current Azure-centered stack
summary: Healthcare data analyst with strong SQL, ETL validation, and data quality experience across payer-oriented datasets and enterprise reporting environments. Well suited for analyst roles that combine large-scale healthcare data analysis, stakeholder collaboration, and dashboard-ready output.
headline: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Large-Scale Data Validation | Dashboard Support
notes: Worth applying if she wants broader healthcare analytics roles, but it is weaker than Veeva, IMO, and CareMessage. Tailoring should frame her as analytics-ready rather than purely QA-focused.
job_description:
# Data Analyst
Company: Arcadia
Source date checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/arcadia/cced8545-bd78-4ab6-82e8-28fae21b155e

## Why it fits
- Remote healthcare analytics role with SQL and dashboard overlap.
- Involves large data sets, payer use cases, and cross-functional collaboration.

## Key requirements from the posting
- Build analytics dashboards and scorecards.
- Analyze tens of millions of healthcare records.
- Support payer-focused use cases in utilization, cost, quality, and risk.
- Work with SQL and BI tools.
